title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report — AIAgent_05_2026
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training program for the course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' has achieved a high completion rate of 100% and a solid attendance rate of 90.4%. However, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk due to the pass rate of 92.3%, which indicates that some trainees may require additional support to meet performance expectations.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has the strongest effectiveness score (89.47) in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 course group contained learners who need support based on score or attendance policy.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag was triggered.
The course had a total of 13 trainees, with an average score of 7.88 out of 10 and a feedback rating of 4.73 out of 5.
Despite the high completion and attendance rates, there are indications that at least one learner is below the pass threshold, necessitating targeted interventions.
The total training hours amounted to 188, with a scaled cost of 9.6, reflecting a ROI proxy of 0.042.
recommendations: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources
Assign a coaching owner for support-needed learners and review attendance issues with direct managers.
It is recommended to implement 1:1 coaching for trainees identified as needing additional support, as flagged by the NORM-07 rule.
Additionally, consider enhancing course materials or delivery methods to address the effectiveness classification and ensure all trainees can achieve the desired pass rates.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID, trainee ID, period
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
